zh.Den Haag, ZH Netherlands: 荷蘭-拉藍德丹 哈格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten於1150年出生在荷蘭霍蘭蒙尼肯達姆時，他的父親Dirk Persijn van Putten32歲，母親Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland29歲。他於1171年1月3日與Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem在荷蘭福利曼德哈林根結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1224年9月20日在荷蘭霍蘭艾姆-賓享年74歲，埋葬在荷蘭霍蘭艾姆-賓。

zh-hans.Den Haag, ZH Netherlands: 荷兰-拉藍德丹 哈格
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten于1150年出生在荷兰霍蘭蒙尼肯達姆时，他的父亲Dirk Persijn van Putten32岁，母亲Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland29岁。他于1171年1月3日与Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem在荷兰福利曼德哈林根结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1224年9月20日在荷兰霍蘭艾姆-賓享年74岁，埋葬在荷兰霍蘭艾姆-賓。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Putten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Essex): variant of   Outen  .

variants.name: Ooten
meanings: Dutch: variant of   Outten  .

variants.name: Outen
meanings: English (mainly Hampshire and Sussex):

in Hampshire and Sussex a topographic name from Middle English ove(n), uve(n) (Old English ofan, ufan) ‘above’ + Middle English toun (Old English tūn) ‘village’, denoting someone who lived at the upper or higher end of a village. It appears to be a type of formation particular to Sussex; compare Easton 2.

in Essex and East Anglia probably a variant of   Olton   alias   Oulton  , from either of two places called Oulton in Norfolk and Suffolk. The /l/ has been vocalized and absorbed into the preceding vowel.

nameMeanings.name: Jan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

nameMeanings.name: Dirksz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Dutch: variant of   Dirksen  .

variants.name: Dirksen
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Erwin, Fritz, Otto, Volkmar, Willi, Wolfgang.
Dutch and North German: patronymic from   Dirk  .

nameMeanings.name: Persijn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Croatian (Peršin): from peršin ‘parsley’, probably used as a nickname of a grower or seller.
Slovenian (Peršin): augmentative derivative of the old personal name Perše, itself a derivative of Peter .
French: nickname derived from Old French pers ‘blue, livid, deathly pale’, probably denoting a man with pale complexion.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten was born in 1150, in Monnickendam, Holland, Netherlands, his father, Dirk Persijn van Putten, was 32 and his mother, Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, was 29. He married Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem on 3 January 1171, in Harlingen, Friesland, Netherlands. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 20 September 1224, in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Netherlands, at the age of 74, and was buried in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Netherlands.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten est né en 1150, à Monnickendam, Holland, Pays-Bas, son père, Dirk Persijn van Putten, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem le 3 janvier 1171, à Harlingen, Frise, Pays-Bas. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 20 septembre 1224, à Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Pays-Bas, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Pays-Bas.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten 1150 in Monnickendam, Holland, Niederlande geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dirk Persijn van Putten 32 und seine Mutter Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland 29. Er hat am 3. Januar 1171 in Harlingen, Friesland, Niederlande Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 20. September 1224 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Niederlande und wurde in Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Niederlande begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten è nato il nel 1150 nel Monnickendam, Holland, Paesi Bassi, il suo padre, Dirk Persijn van Putten, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem il 3 gennaio 1171, nel Harlingen, Friesland, Paesi Bassi. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 20 settembre 1224, nel Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Paesi Bassi, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Paesi Bassi.

ja.lifeSummary: Jan Dirksz Persijn van Puttenが1150年にオランダホーランドモニクエンダムで生まれた時，父Dirk Persijn van Puttenは32歳，母Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterlandは29歳であった。1171年1月3日にオランダフリースランドハーリンジェンでAgnes Simondsdr van Haerlemと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1224年9月20日にオランダホーランドエグモンド-ビンで74歳で死去し，オランダホーランドエグモンド-ビンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten(이)가 1150년 네덜란드 홀랜드 몬이c켄다에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dirk Persijn van Putten(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1171년 1월 3일 네덜란드 프리슬랜드 하를링에서 Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1224년 9월 20일 네덜란드 홀랜드 그몽-빈에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 네덜란드 홀랜드 그몽-빈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten nasceu em 1150, em Monnickendam, Holland, Países Baixos, seu pai, Dirk Persijn van Putten, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem em 3 de janeiro de 1171, em Harlingen, Frísia, Países Baixos. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 20 de setembro de 1224, em Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Baixos, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Baixos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten родился в 1150 г. в местности монниккендам, холланд, Нидерланды, его отцу по имени Dirk Persijn van Putten было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem 3 января 1171 г. в местности харлинген, фриесланд, Нидерланды. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 20 сентября 1224 г. в местности эгмонд-биннен, холланд, Нидерланды в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности эгмонд-биннен, холланд, Нидерланды.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jan Dirksz Persijn van Putten nació en 1150, en Monnickendam, Holland, Países Bajos, su papá, Dirk Persijn van Putten, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Bertrade Arnoudsdr. Spiker van Waterland Erfvrouwe van Waterland, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Agnes Simondsdr van Haerlem el 3 de enero de 1171, en Harlingen, Frisia, Países Bajos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 20 de septiembre de 1224, en Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Bajos, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en Egmond-Binnen, Holland, Países Bajos.
